# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{
  "change_summary": "Plan and implementation completed for the pending drain amendments. The drain start/resume adapters now await `execute_start` and `execute_resume` directly so the existing run command signal handling owns cancellation cleanup, pid cleanup, interrupted handoff persistence, and writer lease release. Non-completed run snapshots now preserve the original `AppError` failure observation when available, cancellation maps to `RunInterrupted`, failed snapshots read the run journal for canonical failure classes, and failed snapshots with a generic/noncanonical `run_failed` label fall back to the latest matching `stage_failed` event. Added focused tests covering journal-backed backend exhaustion, stage-failure fallback, cancellation-to-interruption mapping, and preservation of the original failure class for still-running snapshots.",
  "outstanding_risks": [
